_note: Fake Afilio Campaign Description API XML response. Field names from public docs (ID, Nome, URL, Descricao, Status, Saleprice, Leadprice, Clicprice, ...). No real data.
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<campaigns>

  </campaign>
